modules.name: mchammer._internal.mc_operations
documentation: Module of Monte Carlo operations.

functions.name: mchammer._internal.mc_operations.translate_atoms_along_vector
documentation: Translate atoms with given ids along a vector.

functions.name: mchammer._internal.mc_operations.translate_molecule_along_vector
documentation: Translate a whole molecule along a vector.

functions.name: mchammer._internal.mc_operations.test_move
documentation: Test an MC move based on boltzmann energy.

functions.name: mchammer._internal.mc_operations.rotation_matrix_arbitrary_axis
documentation:
Returns a rotation matrix of `angle` radians about `axis`.

Parameters:
: angle:

  : The size of the rotation in radians.

  axis:

  : A 3 element aray which represents a vector. The vector is the
    axis about which the rotation is carried out. Must be of
    unit magnitude.

Returns:

: A `3x3` array representing a rotation matrix.

functions.name: mchammer._internal.mc_operations.rotate_molecule_by_angle
documentation: Rotate a molecule by an angle about an axis and origin.

modules.name: mchammer._internal.results
documentation: Define classes holding result information.

classes.name: mchammer._internal.results.StepResult

methods.name: mchammer._internal.results.StepResult.get_properties
documentation: Get step properties.

Results of a step.

Parameters:
: step:

  : Step number.

  position_matrix:

  : A position matrix after performing this step. The shape of
    the matrix is `(n, 3)`.

  max_bond_distance:

  : Max length of bonds to be optimized in Angstrom.

  log:

  : String log of this step.

classes.name: mchammer._internal.results.MCStepResult

methods.name: mchammer._internal.results.MCStepResult.get_properties
documentation: Get step properties.

Results of a step.

Parameters:
: step:

  : Step number.

  position_matrix:

  : A position matrix after performing this step. The shape of
    the matrix is `(n, 3)`.

  passed:

  : Flag for whether the MC move passed, or was reverted to
    the previous step.

  system_potential:

  : System potential of the structure after this step.

  nonbonded_potential:

  : Nonbonded potential of the structure after this step.

  max_bond_distance:

  : Max length of bonds to be optimized in Angstrom.

  log:

  : String log of this step.

Return a matrix holding the atomic positions.

Write basic `.xyz` file of Molecule to `path`.

Connectivity is not maintained in this file type!

documentation: Yield the bonds in the molecule, ordered as input.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.molecule.Molecule.get_num_atoms
documentation: Return the number of atoms in the molecule.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.molecule.Molecule.get_centroid
documentation:
Return the centroid.

Parameters:
: atom_ids: {class}`iterable` of {class}`int`, optional

  : The ids of atoms which are used to calculate the
    centroid. Can be a single {class}`int`, if a single
    atom is to be used, or `None` if all atoms are to be
    used.

Returns:

: The centroid of atoms specified by `atom_ids`.

Raises:

: If `atom_ids` has a length of `0`.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.molecule.Molecule.get_subunits
documentation:
Get connected graphs based on Molecule separated by bonds.

Parameters:
: bond_pair_ids:

  : {class}`iterable` of {class}`tuple` of {class}`ints`
    Iterable of pairs of atom ids with bond between them to
    optimize.

Returns:
: subunits:

  : The subunits of `mol` split by bonds defined by
    `bond_pair_ids`. Key is subunit identifier, Value is
    {class}`iterable` of atom ids in subunit.

Molecule to optimize.

  : Atoms that define the molecule.

  bonds:

  : Bonds between atoms that define the molecule.

  position_matrix:

  : A `(n, 3)` matrix holding the position of every atom in
    the {class}`.Molecule`.

modules.name: mchammer._internal.radii
documentation:
This module defines atom radii in Angstrom.

The atom radii used are from Austin Mroz and their STREUSEL method.

https://github.com/hmsoregon/STREUSEL

modules.name: mchammer._internal.optimizer
documentation: Optimizer for minimising intermolecular distances.

classes.name: mchammer._internal.optimizer.Optimizer

methods.name: mchammer._internal.optimizer.Optimizer.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a {class}`Optimizer` instance.

Parameters:
: step_size:

  : The relative size of the step to take during step.

  target_bond_length:

  : Target equilibrium bond length for long bonds to minimize
    to.

  num_steps:

  : Number of MC moves to perform.

  bond_epsilon:

  : Value of epsilon used in the bond potential in MC moves.
    Determines strength of the bond potential.
    Defaults to 50.

  nonbond_epsilon:

  : Value of epsilon used in the nonbond potential in MC moves.
    Determines strength of the nonbond potential.
    Defaults to 20.

  nonbond_sigma:

  : Value of sigma used in the nonbond potential in MC moves.
    Defaults to 1.2.

  nonbond_mu:

  : Value of mu used in the nonbond potential in MC moves.
    Determines the steepness of the nonbond potential.
    Defaults to 3.

  beta:

  : Value of beta used in the in MC moves. Beta takes the
    place of the inverse boltzmann temperature.
    Defaults to 2.

  random_seed:

  : Random seed to use for MC algorithm. Should only be set to
    `None` if system-based random seed is desired. Defaults
    to a set seed of 1000, to avoid randomness.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.optimizer.Optimizer._bond_potential
documentation:
Define an arbitrary parabolic bond potential.

This potential has no relation to an empircal forcefield.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.optimizer.Optimizer._nonbond_potential
documentation:
Define an arbitrary repulsive nonbonded potential.

This potential has no relation to an empircal forcefield.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.optimizer.Optimizer.compute_potential
documentation: Compute the potential of a molecule.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.optimizer.Optimizer.get_trajectory
documentation:
Get trajectory of optimization run on `mol`.

Parameters:
: mol:

  : The molecule to be optimized.

  bond_pair_ids:

  : {class}`iterable` of {class}`tuple` of {class}`ints`
    Iterable of pairs of atom ids with bond between them to
    optimize.

  subunits:

  : The subunits of `mol` split by bonds defined by
    `bond_pair_ids`. Key is subunit identifier, Value is
    {class}`iterable` of atom ids in subunit.

Returns:
: mol:

  : The optimized molecule.

  result:

  : The result of the optimization including all steps.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.optimizer.Optimizer.get_result
documentation:
Get final result of optimization run on `mol`.

Parameters:
: mol:

  : The molecule to be optimized.

  bond_pair_ids:

  : {class}`iterable` of {class}`tuple` of {class}`ints`
    Iterable of pairs of atom ids with bond between them to
    optimize.

  subunits:

  : The subunits of `mol` split by bonds defined by
    `bond_pair_ids`. Key is subunit identifier, Value is
    {class}`iterable` of atom ids in subunit.

Returns:
: mol:

  : The optimized molecule.

  result:

  : The result of the final optimization step.

Optimize target bonds using MC algorithm.

A Metropolis MC algorithm is applied to perform rigid
translations of the subunits separatred by the target bonds.

documentation: file generated by setuptools_scm
don't change, don't track in version control

modules.name: mchammer._internal.collapser
documentation: Optimizer for minimising intermolecular distances.

classes.name: mchammer._internal.collapser.Collapser

methods.name: mchammer._internal.collapser.Collapser.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a {class}`Collapser` instance.

Parameters:
: step_size:

  : The relative size of the step to take during collapse.

  distance_threshold:

  : Distance between distinct subunits to use as
    threshold for halting collapse in Angstrom.

  scale_steps:

  : Whether to scale the step of each distict building block
    by their relative distance from the molecules centroid.
    Defaults to `True`

methods.name: mchammer._internal.collapser.Collapser._has_short_contacts
documentation: Calculate if there are short contants in mol.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.collapser.Collapser._get_subunit_distances
documentation:
Yield the distances between subunits in mol.

Ignores H atoms.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.collapser.Collapser._get_new_position_matrix
documentation: Get the position matrix of the mol after translation.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.collapser.Collapser._get_subunit_vectors
documentation:
Get the subunit to COM vectors.

Parameters:
: mol:

  : The molecule to be optimized.

  subunits:

  : The subunits of `mol` split by bonds defined by
    `bond_pair_ids`. Key is subunit identifier, Value is
    {class}`iterable` of atom ids in subunit.

Returns:
: su_cent_vectors:

  : {class}`dict` mapping {class}`int`: to
    {class}`numpy.ndarray`
    Dictionary mapping subunit ids (keys) to centroid
    vectors (values) of each distinct building block in the
    molecule.

  su_cent_scales:

  : {class}`dict` mapping {class}`int`: to {class}`float`
    Dictionary mapping subunit ids (keys) to relative
    magnitude of centroid vectors (values) of each distinct
    building block in the molecule.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.collapser.Collapser.get_trajectory
documentation:
Get trajectory of optimization run on `mol`.

Parameters:
: mol:

  : The molecule to be optimized.

  bond_pair_ids:

  : {class}`iterable` of {class}`tuple` of {class}`ints`
    Iterable of pairs of atom ids with bond between them to
    optimize.

  subunits:

  : The subunits of `mol` split by bonds defined by
    `bond_pair_ids`. Key is subunit identifier, Value is
    {class}`iterable` of atom ids in subunit.

Returns:
: mol:

  : The optimized molecule.

  result:

  : The result of the optimization including all steps.

methods.name: mchammer._internal.collapser.Collapser.get_result
documentation:
Get final result of the optimization of `mol`.

Parameters:
: mol:

  : The molecule to be optimized.

  bond_pair_ids:

  : {class}`iterable` of {class}`tuple` of {class}`ints`
    Iterable of pairs of atom ids with bond between them to
    optimize.

  subunits:

  : The subunits of `mol` split by bonds defined by
    `bond_pair_ids`. Key is subunit identifier, Value is
    {class}`iterable` of atom ids in subunit.

Returns:
: mol:

  : The optimized molecule.

  result:

  : The result of the final optimization step.
Moves rigid-subunits toward center of mass of molecule.
